U.S. SLED · Back-office engineering for primes

Back-office technical engineering for U.S. SLED prime contractors.

Specialized subcontractor support for GIS, AI, automation, statutory document production, grant reporting, and platform modernization. NDA-first. Subcontract-only. We never face the agency.

Start an NDA conversation → Capability statement → How we engage →
~10h
US/PK overlap, daily
1 day
Response SLA, NDA-bound
NDA
First on substantive contact
0
Agency-facing engagements
Subcontract-only · NDA-first intake · We never face the agency · We do not compete with our partners
SAM.gov UEI Add UEI
CAGE Code Add CAGE
Business size Small Business?
Federal classification NAICS 541511 · 541512 · 541519
State procurement NIGP 918-46 · 918-00
Insurance Prime-routed
Response SLA 1 business day
Compliance posture SOC 2 Type II in progress · NIST 800-171 aligned
Who we are not

Techtiz is not a procurement intelligence firm. We are a technical implementation subcontractor for U.S. SLED primes. For RFP intelligence, our partners use Deltek GovWin and Bloomberg Government.

Two engagement modes. One contract structure.

Engage us pre-award, post-award, or both, the prime always stays the face to the agency.

Under teaming letter and NDA. Pre-award, we draft proposal volumes and build demo systems for your evaluation panel. Post-award, we deliver the technical workstream. Either way, white-labeled.

Phase 01 · Pre-Award (under teaming letter + NDA)

Load the technical volume. Build the demo. Package past performance.

The Pain Point

"17 days to submission. Your architect is on another pursuit. Technical volume, compliance matrix, and orals demo all need owners."

↳ Our role: Proposal-support services under teaming letter
01

Technical volume writing

Solution architecture, approach, and methodology sections drafted to your outline and style guide.

02

Compliance matrix preparation

Line-by-line traceability against the SOW, every statutory requirement mapped to a proposal section, owner, and evidence.

03

LOE & pricing input

Bottom-up labor estimates with optimistic/likely/pessimistic ranges. Direct-to-pricing model handoff.

04

Demo & POC builds for orals

Working prototypes the evaluation panel can click, not slideware. Built in 2-3 weeks, ready for orals.

05

Past-performance packaging

Citation writeups, CPARS-equivalent narratives, and reference letters, in your prime-branded templates.

06

Key personnel resume tailoring

Resume edits, role mapping, and LCAT alignment for proposed staff (yours or ours, named on your roster).

Phase 02 · Post-Award

Deliver the technical workstream, under your name.

The Pain Point

"Kickoff Monday. You need senior engineers in seats, a sprint cadence the agency PM trusts, and zero compliance findings. Bench is thin, ramp-up is tight."

↳ Our role: Back-office delivery · white-label
01

Senior engineering surge

Named, vetted engineers, not generic resumes. Cleared resources available; team scaling 2-20 FTEs.

02

White-label delivery

All artifacts, code, comms, docs, demos, carry your prime brand. We never appear in agency-facing channels.

03

Sprint delivery under your PM

We slot into your cadence, your tooling, your Definition of Done. Weekly burndown reports to your PM only.

04

Compliance posture maintained

CJIS, HIPAA, IRS Pub 1075, StateRAMP-aligned controls applied to our work, inside your authorization boundary.

05

Documentation & KT

Living architecture docs, runbooks, and ATO artifacts. KT package delivered before each milestone close.

06

IV&V response support

Findings remediation, audit responses, and CAP narratives, turned in your templates within SLA.

Delivery model

Onshore PM-led. Offshore-engineered. Prime-controlled, end to end.

US-based partner manager runs the engagement. Senior engineers in Lahore build the work. Agency sees the prime; the prime sees one accountable contact.

24-hour delivery clock

~10 hours of timezone overlap, same-day responses, overnight progress.

12a3a6a9a12p3p6p9p12a
PK ENG · 11A-8P PKT
US PM · 9A-6P ET
← Lahore picks up overnight ~10h overlap US wraps the day →
Concern 01

Follow-the-sun delivery without the 3 a.m. Slack pings.

Pain: offshore vendors that bury PMs in async messages, gap on handoffs, stall on US-hours blockers.
Our fix: US engagement manager owns daily standup. Lahore picks up overnight. ~10 hours of US/PK overlap, same-day responses.
Concern 02

NDA-bound from the first 30-minute call.

Pain: capture leads who can't share the RFP or past-performance set until paperwork clears.
Our fix: Mutual NDA ready to sign before the discovery call. Sensitive details stay in encrypted channels with audit trails.
Concern 03

IP assigned to you on day one.

Pain: subcontractors who keep ownership of "reusable components" and license them back, complicating government IP rights.
Our fix: Period-of-performance IP assignment baked into the teaming letter. Code and artifacts belong to the prime.
Concern 04

Named seniors. No bait-and-switch.

Pain: principal engineers on the proposal, junior engineers on delivery. CPARS pain that shows up at year-end review.
Our fix: Resumes you propose are the engineers who execute. Substitutions only with prime + agency approval.
Operating Principles

How we work behind a prime.

Four non-negotiables that govern every engagement. Signed into our teaming letter so there's no ambiguity.

Locked in teaming letter
01

You stay the only voice to the agency.

Never in agency-facing emails, calls, or deliverables. No co-logos, no "powered by" footers. If the agency asks who built it, the answer is your name.

02

Your brand on every artifact.

Code, docs, decks, runbooks, and dashboards ship under your prime brand. Internal IP licensed to you for the period of performance.

03

Compliance posture, kept.

We operate inside your authorization boundary. CJIS, HIPAA, IRS Pub 1075, StateRAMP-aligned controls applied to our work. Audit-ready artifacts on demand.

04

Prime PM owns the relationship.

Status, escalations, and change requests flow through your PM. Weekly burndowns to you, never to the agency. You decide what to surface upstream.

Outcomes that matter to primes

What changes when Techtiz is on your team.

100%
GIS-tagged facility inventory delivered on a state environmental plan
0
Statutory-format deficiencies on first submission
35/3535
Municipalities covered per-meeting briefing pack
0
Late quarterly grant reports filed
0
Agency-facing engagements ever
The Techtiz SLED Backbone

The platform you plug into.

Six capabilities, one stack. Built for the RFP work no off-the-shelf product covers cleanly.

Full capability matrix →
01 · Specify

Technical Requirements Analysis

Translating SOW technical sections into architecture, integration, and delivery specifications. Under NDA, against a defined engagement scope.
02 · Map

GIS & Data Layer

Facility inventories, forecast models, supply chain analysis. ArcGIS, PostGIS, GeoPandas.
03 · Engage

Engagement Cloud

Public surveys, multilingual platforms, comment capture, disadvantaged-community reach.
04 · Produce

Document Production Suite

Statutory-format compliant deliverables in PDF, InDesign, ArcGIS, Word, Excel. EGLE-validated.
05 · Report

Grant Reporting Automation

Quarterly milestone reports generated from project delivery data. Zero late filings.
06 · Comply

Statutory Compliance Layer

Plan-content checklists, adoption-sequence tracking, audit trails per state framework.
Specializations we go deep on

The technical domains we engineer in.

Five surface areas where we keep specialized engineers, tooling, and statutory-format expertise on hand. Plug-in ready under a prime's master subcontract.

Delivered engagement examples →
01

Materials & environmental data platforms

Facility inventories, capacity forecast models, multi-source spatial joins, and statutory-format document production for environmental plans adopted under state framework guidance.

ArcGISPostGISGeoPandasEGLE-format tooling
02

Accessibility remediation engineering

WCAG 2.2 AA component-library refactors, PDF/UA conversion pipelines, screen-reader regression suites, plain-language editing of statutory content at portal scale.

axe DevToolsNVDA / VoiceOverPDF/UAPandoc
03

Permitting & licensing system modernization

Service-layer wrappers over legacy mainframes, ETL pipelines for record migration, reconciliation reporting, IV&V response packages, audit-trail and FOIA export tooling.

AirbytedbtPostgreSQLSupabase
04

Public engagement platform engineering

Multilingual survey platforms, comment-capture and triage workflows, hearing-pack generators, disadvantaged-community outreach instrumentation, equity dashboards.

i18nextTwilioSendGridCustom survey
05

Grant reporting automation

Quarterly milestone reporting pipelines, federal-state reconciliation engines, deadline alerting, audit-trail artifacts, format generators for pass-through programs.

n8nMake.comWorkday AdaptiveMetabase
+

A specialization not listed?

If your pursuit sits adjacent to one of these surface areas, the capability is likely covered. Start with a 30-minute NDA-first conversation; we'll map our team shape to your SOW.

Start an NDA conversation →
Procurement Vehicles

Easy to put on contract.

We work through your existing vehicles. Tell us how the agency buys and we'll structure the teaming agreement to fit.

Don't see your vehicle?
Email sled@techtiz.co

OMNIA, Sourcewell, regional
Via partner primes

Open RFP / RFQ

Bid support as named subcontractor
14 wins last 24 mo
Why Techtiz

Three answers to three questions every prime asks.

01 · Specialization depth

We've engineered the deliverables your SOW will name.

Real production work across GIS, AI, workflow automation, statutory document production, and grant reporting, ready to plug into your bid stack under teaming letter.

Counter to "do you understand U.S. SLED technical scope?"
02 · Back-office only

We never face the agency.

Our model depends on being the partner that makes your delivery stronger, not the firm that walks past you into procurement. We engage only through a prime. No exceptions.

Counter to "will you go around us?"
03 · Your terms

We work on your contract.

Subcontract under your master agreement. Insurance routes through you. IP per your standard NDA. We adapt to your delivery model. You don't adapt to ours.

Counter to "how risky is this operationally?"
Partner with us

NDA first. Subcontract second. White-label always.

Capture managers, BD leads, and program managers at U.S. primes: a US partner manager replies within one business day with a mutual NDA template and a 30-minute calendar slot. No public materials exchanged before the NDA is signed.

  • One business day response
  • Mutual NDA on first contact
  • Teaming letter template included
  • White-label clause built-in
Pre-Award Proposal Support

Under NDA + teaming letter

Post-Award Delivery

Engineers, sprints, KT

By submitting, you agree to a mutual NDA on first substantive contact.

Your inquiry is ready to send.

Your email client should have opened a pre-filled message to sled@techtiz.co. If it didn't, email that address directly — we reply within one business day with a mutual NDA template.

Start another inquiry
